name: HGSOC fingerprint external validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD

source_receipts.anchor: HGSOC fingerprint external validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD

verbatim_evidence.claim: GSE32062 tiered OS separation was non-significant (logrank p=0.929, validation_holds=false) using transferred discovery thresholds. The favorable-survival claim is a pooled-discovery finding awaiting successful external replication; do not present it as externally validated.
